# growthbook_saved_group (Resource)

A GrowthBook saved group. Saved groups are reusable sets of users, defined either as a `list` (an attribute key plus a list of values) or a `condition` (a JSON-encoded targeting condition).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A "list" saved group: an explicit set of attribute values.
resource "growthbook_saved_group" "beta_users" {
  name          = "Beta users"
  type          = "list"
  attribute_key = "id"
  values        = ["user_1", "user_2", "user_3"]
  owner         = "growth-team"
}

# A "condition" saved group: a reusable targeting condition.
resource "growthbook_saved_group" "us_enterprise" {
  name      = "US enterprise accounts"
  type      = "condition"
  condition = jsonencode({ country = "US", plan = "enterprise" })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The display name of the saved group.

### Optional

- `attribute_key` (String) When `type` is `list`, the attribute key the group is based on. Immutable; changing it forces a new saved group.
- `condition` (String) When `type` is `condition`, the JSON-encoded targeting condition for the group.
- `owner` (String) The userId or email address of the owner.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs this saved group is scoped to. Empty means all projects.
- `type` (String) The type of saved group: `list` or `condition`. Inferred from the other arguments when omitted. Immutable; changing it forces a new saved group.
- `values` (List of String) When `type` is `list`, the list of values for the attribute key.

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the saved group is archived.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Description of the saved group.
- `id` (String) Unique saved group identifier (e.g. `grp_...`).
- `use_empty_list_group` (Boolean) Whether an empty list group matches nobody (rather than everybody).
